feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: total shelf life field is not appearing in purchase order
entry.content: In PO delivery tab Minimum Remaining Shelf Life field is appearing but the total shelf life field is not appearing.

entry.title: outbound delivery batch determine VCH1 exclusion and user exit
entry.content:
Dear Export,

We have a scenario during sales outbound delivery batch determination: for some customer material combination, some batch needs to be excluded or can only be specify , the reason for the exclusion or specify various, batch characteristic don't include all the reasons, so in a way, we need to directly exclude or specify some batch. So we are wondering if 1. Can we setup exclusion such as batch in VCH1, how should we maintain, such as what symbol? 2. Is there an user exit to modify the batch determine selection results? such as for the VCH1 setup, system pick up 8 avaliable batch, we can use the user exit to exclude 2 batches, only remining 6 batch parcitipate the batch assignment, or directly pick the specify batch?

Best Regards

entry.title: fixed text ME53N
entry.content: Text of the destination deposit field in the RC, has the current information in S4 - as Supplier Center. We need it to be corrected to the correct information, which is Stock Output Warehouse. According to the attached file, we saw that this is a fixed text in the program, making it necessary to correct the translation of the text into Brazilian Portuguese

entry.title: Create Maintenance Plan App - missing fields in intial screen and Maint plan categ SO is missing
entry.content: In Create Maintenance Plan App, selection fields are missing in the initial screen and maintenance plan catergory SO is missing when tcode IP41 is used.

entry.title: Unable to create follow-up service order via API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV – linkage to parent missing
entry.content:
We are implementing service order creation in SAP S/4HANA 2023 (Private Cloud Edition) using the OData API `API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV`. Our business requirement is to create a **follow-up service order** that links back to an existing (parent) service order, similar to document flow logic in SAP CRM.

We have tested the following fields during service order creation:

- `ReferenceServiceOrder` (header level)
- `ReferenceServiceOrderItem` (item level)
- `RefServiceOrderTemplate`
- `RefServiceOrderTemplateItem`

In all cases:
- The service order is created successfully, but no transactional linkage to the parent order is formed.
- No document flow appears in the UI or via API.
- The fields appear to behave as free-text reference fields with no functional impact.

We would like to confirm the following:

1. Is there a supported mechanism to create a **follow-up service order** (predecessor-successor relationship) using `API_SERVICE_ORDER_SRV`?
2. If not, is there an enhancement planned in a future release or a known workaround (e.g., BAdI, enhancement spot)?
3. Is there any supported way to reflect document flow between service orders — e.g., similar to CRM’s `CRMD_LINK` or ECC’s `VBFA`?

We are following clean-core principles and would like to avoid classic BAPI fallback unless absolutely necessary.

Example payload tested:
- Parent service order: `8000001234`
- Targeted linkage via fields like `ReferenceServiceOrder`, `RefServiceOrderTemplate`, etc.

Please advise on whether follow-up creation is supported via standard APIs or must be implemented via extensions.

Thank you!

entry.title: overtime calculation based on the below formula:Basic Salary/240*2.50*No.of Hours
entry.content:
In our UAE Client now overtime calculated on gross  salary but they want to calculated the overtime on basic salary formula.

Please help me on configuration and calculation. for your understanding I'm attached the screenshot.

entry.title: Assign Storage bin to PSA for multiple products in Mass
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are looking for all the options available in SAP EWM to assign storage bin to PSA for multiple products. Currently we use transaction code /SCWM/PSASTAGE & /SCWM/PSASTAGE2 which do not fulfill our requirement.

Please help us finding out the options to update the PSASTAGE table in mass (other than LSMW).

Regards

Shatrudhan

entry.title: Unable to create "Packing" on credit blocked delivery
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When we create delivery which is blocked due to credit check, system does not allow us to  select the handling unit  in the "pack" process of the delivery. Standard behavior is not to allow picking for such credit blocked delivery and this is understandable. I am not even changing the pick quantity. By default at time of delivery creation the pick quantity is blank. 

Warehouse users wants to be able to create a packing step for such credit blocked delivery before picking it and actually shipping the product to customer.

I have given the screen shots on the enclosed document with the behavior of "pack" before and after credit release .

We have migrated from ECC 6.0 to  S4 HANA 2023 On Premise . 

Trust experts would be able to guide me to a quick resolution.

Thanks,

Kartik Shah

Before and After credit check status for the "Pack" the delivery items.

Status of delivery- Credit Block – Credit check executed document not Okay.

Packing status – Blank ( Not Relevant)

When trying to perform “pack” I get this screen with no option to select any handling unit

Once the credit block is released using VKM4 for the delivery we now have the status as Approved by Credit Representative

Once the credit block is removed and I perform the “pack” process I am able to select the handling unit on the packing screen but still shows the same message HUDIALOG017

entry.title: S4hana upgrade issue
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are perform s4hana upgrade from 2020 FPS01 to 2023 FPS03.

Currently we are in configuration phase , we have encountered an issue in sub phase Current Phase: PREP_EXTENSION/ADDON_LANGINC and error is like below.

Add-On Language Packages Missing

The inclusion of the add-on languages has been completed, but language packages are missing for some of the selected languages "A1MCKNEUFDGHIJ3LP4RQ5SV2T".

For the following add-ons and languages, language packages are missing:

Add-OnLanguage

AUDICArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishOTEXBASArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishOTEXERPArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishOTEXRLArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishOTVIMBASArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishOTVIMFUIArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishOTVIMINVArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishST-A/PIArabic, Chinese trad., Czech, Danish, DutchOTVIMARCArabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, DanishTAUCI1Arabic, Chinese, Chinese trad., Czech, Danish

 

Can you please check and suggest on this

entry.title: Advance return order-repair order -Data for creating a delivery is incomplete (Supplier)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Iam getting error while creating the repair order through advance return order.

System shows as error data for creating the delivery is incomplete ( supplier )

Why its getting error message in supplier.

Kindly refer the below screen shot. pls support

entry.title: Tr.CJ02にて、項目名を修正するためにノート3578470を充てたが、特定の項目しか修正されない
entry.content:
JFQ293の環境Tr.CJ02にて、項目名「Typ」が「プ」となっていた。

これを修正するためにノート3578470を充てた結果、基本データタブの「プ」は修正されたが、全般タブのは「プ」のままである。原因を教えていただきたいです。

entry.title: LOG OF CHANGES TO USERS IN SAP S4HANA
entry.content:
I am encountering the following situation.
In SAP S4HANA I have not been able to identify in which tables the user change logs are stored in SU01.
For example, the last modification date of the user and which field was modified.

 

 

What I checked: the CDHDR and CDPOS tables do not store this type of modifications, for example: I modified a user's validation end field, and this is not stored in these tables.

Investigating I find the following: In S/4HANA:

Many changes are now handled via internal APIs, synchronization strategies and structures like SUID_ST_NODE_ADMINDATA.

Not all user changes are automatically reflected in CDHDR/CDPOS, even if they used to be reflected in ECC

SAP uses structures like SUID_ST_CHANGELOG, which is not a base table but is used in standard reports for traceability.

Anyone how can I access these change logs

Thanks.

entry.title: E: Function code SPLTPB not defined for flow; contact your system administrator (/SCWM/UI_RF022)
entry.content:
While trying to split the WT using the exception code SPPB  during putaway on a RF device, the system is throwing the error "E: Function code SPLTPB not defined for flow; contact your system administrator (/SCWM/UI_RF022)".
PS: We are posting putaway at HU level.

entry.title: Mexico XML Surcharges
entry.content: HI, I need to show the surcharges as a separate line item in XML and customer PDF., Is there a standard way to achieve this, or is an enhancement required? Could you please let me know the badi or enhancement class.

entry.title: S/4HANAバージョンアップ後にエラーが発生する。BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE VLA316
entry.content:
ご担当者様

お世話になっております。

S/4HANAバージョンアップ後（1909 -> 2023）に「BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE」を実施すると旧環境(1909)と事象が変わりました。

旧環境(1909)では購買発注の保管場所を設定して入荷伝票の保管場所がブランクでも、「BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE」を実行して入庫登録が可能でした。

しかし、新環境(2023)では入荷伝票の保管場所を設定していないとエラーが発生し、発注伝票に保管場所を入れても以前の様に入庫登録できない事象が発生しました。（エラー：VLA316）

2023でこの汎用モジュールの変更はございますでしょうか。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

entry.title: ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT does not exist in system
entry.content: We would like to use program ZLE_ANALYZE_DELIVERY_SPLIT to analyze the delivery split issue, but when I tried to run it via SE38/SA38, it said the program does not exist, could you suggest what program else we can use?

entry.title: Not able to assign the access sequence to the Header condition type ZB01
entry.content:
We created a custom header condition ZB01 and when trying to assign the access sequence getting below error 

ERROR - An access sequence is not defined for the header condition
Message no. VT563

entry.title: Credit exposure commitment type 500 is not updated when SD billing document is created for FWSD
entry.content:
As Transportation company we are using TM system where we are creating FWO orders and FWSD settlements document

When SD billing is created from FWSD document credit exposure with commitment type 100 (open orders) is updated correctly, so value of open orders decrease) but in the same moment value of open billing should increase, (comm.type 500) which is not happening.

Billing document value is not updated at all when billings are created for FWSD docuemnts

Is anybody observe similar issue

entry.title: Add Custom field with Custom fields app and enable the usage to SOAP API in S/4 HANA On-premise
entry.content:
Hi, 

I added custom fields for business context Sales: Sales Document and enabled the usage for service interface: sales order replicate A2A  operation: SalesOrderbulkreplication_OUT

Once it is published custom field is added in the SOAP API but with the different schema format <xsd: group ref > instead of <xsd:element name > ( for standard fields schema format ).
Why is it different that standard? 


Thanks

entry.title: Invalid receiver port when replicating G/L master data between two SAP systems via an IDOC flat file
entry.content:
I've got the following scenario which I want to run without custom program.

It currently fails on the last step, I hope you can propose a standard way to automate.

I've got two production S/4HANA systems C01 and D01, the master data from C01 must be replicated automatically on D01 every X days.

  1. On the system C01, I run the program RBDSER01 to replicate GLMAST messages via the group GRP_FI, which creates several outbound IDOC targeting D01 (one IDOC per G/L master created or changed since the last execution, the information is stored in the change pointers). A receiver file port has been configured. This port writes to a text file on a shared directory.
  2. I run these IDOC via BD87, they are successfully written to the file.
  3. On the system D01, I run the program RSEINB00 to process this text file, which creates several inbound IDOC, but their processing fails with status 56 and message "EDI: Receiver port in control record is invalid" (EA602) due to the receiver port. 

One workaround could have been to run WE12 to copy the file and change the target receiver port to SAPD01 (this works), but I cannot run it automatically.

Isn't there a simple way to integrate this IDOC text file automatically without having to modify it? If not, is there another solution?

Thanks.

Sandra
